race.comment: SO LONG AGO (8) draws beautifully and while there has to be some question marks on the last start given she was unplaced in 16 previous starts, she did win by 6.75 lengths. DUKE OF BEDFORD (1) has not appeared since he saluted over 5500m in The Grand Annual and while you'd think he'd need the run, he's run well fresh in the past, has been trialling well and doesn't strike the strongest race. He could show up. PATSY'S STAR (4) settled well back last start and never threatened when 8 lengths from the winner in the Hanging Rock Cup but hasn't been in 56 grade for a while. FILADEEL (16) sneaks in and can run a race. Has the benefit of a couple of runs back and while beaten over 4 lengths last start, it was a much better race than this and the is suited by the rise in trip.
